titleStmt.title: SII 26.509: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 509. (A.R. No. 482 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vikramapāṇḍyēśvara temple.

p.hi: Parākrama Māṟaṉ Aḻagiya-Śokkaṉār: Ś. 1495 and 2nd year, Śrīmukha, Dakshiṇāyana, Varsha-ṛitu, Vṛiśchika (Kārttigai) 16, śu 6, Sunday, Maghā = 1573 (A.D.), November 15. The tithi ended on the previous day at º99, from º24.

summary.p: This inscription records the appointment to the post of Māḍāpattiyam in the temple of Vikramapāṇḍīśvaram of the place (name not mentioned) to a certain Baṭṭar Aḻagar, a Kaikkōḷar of the temple of the god Chintāmaṇi nādan of Vāśudēvanallūr in Āriya-nāḍu, made by the ruler. It also records the grant made by him, to the same temple official, of two mā of land as mādā pattiyak-kaṇakku kāṇiyāṭchi. Of the two mā of land, one mā is stated to be situated in Śōlaiśērip-paṟṟu in Āṇmā-nāḍu. It is stated that this gift is to be enjoyed heriditarily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Adicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam . tattrailokyanemmāṇatrāṇa samhāra kāraṇam śā
sanam śāśvatam śambhorvikramapāṇḍiśvara sukāraṇam . śakābdam 1000 4 100 9 10 5
ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa namkumāran kulaicekarapaḷḷur parākkiṟamāṟaṟ Aḻa
kiya cokkaṉāṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu śrīmukavaruṣattu dakṣaṇāyanattu varṣa
ṛtu virucikāṭṭa 3 10 2 yum śvaüpakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum Ādiyavāra
mum sukanmayogamum nākarikaraṇamum peṟṟa makattunāḷ namkumāran parā
krammāṟaṉ Aḻakiya cokkaṉār nammālaiyattil tāṉikar kaṇakkar Olaivarakkāṭṭu
kaiyil Āriyaṉāṭṭu vācutevanallūril cintāmaṇinātaṉ koyil
kaikkoḻaril paṭṭar Aḻakarukku nammālaiyattil māṭāpattiyamum māṭā
pattiyakkaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak kuṭutta nilam Iraṇṭu māvukku Āṇmānāṭ
ṭu colaicerippaṟṟil muṭiviḷaṅkum pāṇṭiyaṉ kuḷappaṟṟil ṉilam Oru māvu
m Iṉṉilam Orumāvum mātam Oṉṟukku nālukoṭṭai nellum nālu paṇattuk
kum Iraṇṭukoṭṭai nellum Iraṇṭu paṇamum nāḷoṉṟukku nāṉāḻi coṟṟukku I
runāḻicoṟum maṟṟum Acaltāṉikar kaṇakkarukkocaracuvantiraṅkaḷum ppaṟṟikko
ṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Ācandratāravat san=tati praveśam celaiyiluñ cempilu
m veṭṭi kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷavum Āticaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.509 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
